name: CCIAM Future Energy Limited
summary: CCIAM Future Energy Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the design and provision of energy saving solutions in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and Taiwan. The company designs, installs, and implements ultra performance plant control systems, as well as offers after-sales services, including maintenance, and email and phone support services. It is also involved in the treasury investment and loan financing activities. The company was formerly known as The Hong Kong Building And Loan Agency Limited and changed its name to CCIAM Future Energy Limited in March 2021. CCIAM Future Energy Limited is based in North Point, Hong Kong.
